sections.paragraph:
Original: אלישׁה

Transliteration: 'ĕlı̂yshâh

Phonetic: el-ee-shaw'

BDB Definition:

Elishah = "God of the coming (one)"
  1. descendant of Noah, son of Javan; perhaps ancestor of the Aeolians

Origin: probably of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
